info.title: JobSync Pro API
info.description: AI-powered job search assistant with advanced features

get.description: Diagnostic endpoint: backend fetches Rozee search page and returns status and link count.

post.description:
Create or update a job in the local DB and return the stored job object.

Accepts a dict with keys similar to the job objects returned by scrapers
(title, company, description, url, source, external_id, location, city, etc.).

get.description: Return matching job keywords for autocomplete dropdown from config + stored jobs.

post.description: Save user profile and ingest into ChromaDB as doc_type=user_profile

get.description: Get Kanban board with applications grouped by status

post.description: Move application to different status column
Generate a follow-up email draft for an application.

get.description: Check for stale applications and generate follow-up drafts

post.description: Mark follow-up as sent and update application
Run daily scout to find and save matching jobs
